items.definition_en: The arm is the long part of your body from your shoulder to your hand.
items.example_en: He broke his right arm playing football.

items.definition_en: A leg is one of the parts of your body that you use for walking.
items.example_en: She hurt her leg while running.

items.definition_en: Your foot is the part of your body at the end of your leg.
items.example_en: He put on his shoes and socks on each foot.

items.definition_en: A fist is a hand with the fingers closed tightly together.
items.example_en: She knocked on the door with her fist.

items.definition_en: The ankle is the joint connecting your foot and your leg.
items.example_en: He twisted his ankle while playing tennis.

items.definition_en: A toe is one of the five small parts at the end of your foot.
items.example_en: She painted each toe in a different color.

items.definition_en: A thumb is the short, thick finger on each hand.
items.example_en: He gave a thumbs up to show approval.

items.definition_en: The elbow is the joint in the middle of your arm.
items.example_en: She rested her elbows on the table.

items.definition_en: The wrist is the joint that connects your hand to your arm.
items.example_en: He wore a watch on his left wrist.

items.definition_en: The shoulder is the part of your body where your arm joins your body.
items.example_en: She carried her bag on her right shoulder.

items.definition_en: A fingernail is the hard surface on the tip of each finger.
items.example_en: She painted her fingernails bright red.

items.definition_en: The forearm is the part of your arm between your elbow and wrist.
items.example_en: He has a tattoo on his forearm.

items.definition_en: The shin is the front part of your leg below the knee.
items.example_en: She bruised her shin on the table.

items.definition_en: The knee is the joint in the middle of your leg.
items.example_en: He knelt down and touched his knee to the ground.

items.definition_en: The calf is the back part of your lower leg.
items.example_en: Her calf hurt after running upstairs.

items.definition_en: A knuckle is a part of a finger where it bends.
items.example_en: He cracked his knuckles nervously.

items.definition_en: The heel is the back part of your foot below your ankle.
items.example_en: Her shoes rubbed against her heel.

items.definition_en: The index finger is the finger next to your thumb.
items.example_en: He pointed with his index finger.

items.definition_en: The little finger is the smallest finger on your hand.
items.example_en: She wore a ring on her little finger.

items.definition_en: The middle finger is the longest finger on your hand.
items.example_en: He injured his middle finger at work.
